prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The Rough Sleeping Data Framework specifically pertains to England, as indicated by references to the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government (MHCLG) and local authorities in England. Scotland has its own distinct approach to homelessness and rough sleeping statistics.
